title: Noninvasive investigation of the cardiodynamic response to 6MWT in stroke patients
author: Alice YM YM YM Jones
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6s2hege

steps.title: Objectives and procedures of the study...
steps.instruction: Objectives and procedures of the study were explained to the participants who met the inclusion criteria and written informed consent obtained.

steps.title: Demographic data of each participant including...
steps.instruction: Demographic data of each participant including age, gender, height, weight, body mass index and lean body mass were recorded.

steps.title: The time elapsed since diagnosis of...
steps.instruction: The time elapsed since diagnosis of stroke, medical history, the National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) and Modified Rivermead Mobility Index (MRMI) were recorded from the patient’s medical records.

steps.title: Participants were invited to complete a...
steps.instruction: Participants were invited to complete a 6-minute walk test (6MWT) following the American Thoracic Society Guideline on 2 consecutive days.

steps.title: Preparation for measurement of cardiodynamic variables...
steps.instruction: Preparation for measurement of cardiodynamic variables (heart rate HR, stroke volume SV, cardiac output CO, cardiac index CI) by Impedance Cardiography (PhysioFlow®PF07 EnduroTM, Figure 1A) (data collected every second)

steps.title: Skin resistance over the neck and...
steps.instruction: Skin resistance over the neck and thorax region was lowered with NuPrep gel and 70% isopropyl alcohol.

steps.title: Pregelled Ag/AgCl electrodes, (Skintact model FS-TB...
steps.instruction: Pregelled Ag/AgCl electrodes, (Skintact model FS-TB wet-gel; Leonhard Lang Gmbh, Austria) were placed on the left base of the neck above the supraclavicular fossa, the sternal angle, the V6 position and along the left paraspinal region at the xiphoid level (Figure 2).

steps.title: Electrodes were then connected to the...
steps.instruction: Electrodes were then connected to the Enduro TM which was placed in a belt pouch to maintain its stability during the walk (Figure1 B).

steps.title: Oxygen saturation (measured by Heal Force...
steps.instruction: Oxygen saturation (measured by Heal Force pulse oximeter, POD-3, China) was measured immediately before the 6MWT, at each minute during the 6MWT, and at the end of the 6MWT.

steps.title: Blood pressure (OMRON electronic blood pressure...
steps.instruction: Blood pressure (OMRON electronic blood pressure monitor, U30, China) was measured at rest, immediately after, and at 2-minute intervals after the 6MWT.

steps.title: Prior to the 6MWT, each participant...
steps.instruction: Prior to the 6MWT, each participant was asked to rest in a sitting position for 10 minutes during which baseline parameters were measured.

steps.title: Data analysis – HR, SV, CO,...
steps.instruction: Data analysis – HR, SV, CO, CI data were averaged every 10 seconds and data at rest, at every 30th second during the 6 MWT and at every 30th second for 10 minutes after the 6MWT, were subjected to analysis.

steps.title: Data were analyzed using the IBM...
steps.instruction: Data were analyzed using the IBM SPSS Statistics for Windows, Version 23.0 (Armonk, NY: IBM Corp).
